author: codex-jellyfin

patch.value: Make four-metric coverage portable across Bun and Node

Add a typed Node test-runtime adapter for the Bun.spawn and Bun.serve harness boundaries, keep live read-only E2E separate, expose deterministic Vitest execution and four-dimensional coverage diagnostics, and make portable execution part of release validation.

All deterministic non-live tests pass under Vitest without changing production runtime behavior; Vitest reports statements branches functions and lines across every source file including src/cli.ts; The compiled jf-cli live read-only suite remains a separate passing gate; Release validation includes the cross-runtime suite and documentation records honest non-100 coverage
Exact Bun-only failure surface measured; no matching all-status pm child exists; live instance configuration remains private and read-only.
Creates the trustworthy measurement boundary required to finish the governed 100 percent coverage goal.
Removes 254 Node-runtime harness failures and prevents Bun-only tests from hiding missing branch and statement coverage.
One deterministic four-metric diagnostic plus independent Bun and live E2E proof.
The 100 percent release blocker cannot be addressed honestly until all four dimensions are measurable.

value.author: codex-jellyfin
value.text: Implementation completed after reproducing 254 Vitest failures caused only by missing Bun.spawn and Bun.serve globals; focused and full portable suites now pass.

value.author: codex-jellyfin
value.text: Coverage is intentionally documented as 38.19/37.40/49.92/37.87 rather than represented as complete.

value.author: codex-jellyfin
value.text: Black-box child-process E2E and attributable in-process coverage are complementary gates; neither should be substituted for the other.

value.note: Typed Node adapters for Bun test harness APIs
Portable suite and complete source coverage scope
Portable and four-metric scripts plus release gate

message: Track completed portable four-metric coverage foundation

author: codex-jellyfin
message: Anchor linked tests to repository package manifest

author: codex-jellyfin
message: Run repository tests in tracker workspace context

value.author: codex-jellyfin
value.text: Direct linked commands all pass, but pm test --run is blocked before command execution by upstream core bug https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/642. Verified results are retained from direct runs; this completed jellyfin-cli task is not blocked by the tracker-runner defect.

patch.value: Added a typed Node compatibility adapter for Bun test harness APIs, separated live E2E from attributable coverage, added portable/four-metric scripts, and required the portable suite in release validation.
All deterministic tests run under Vitest, four dimensions are measurable, live E2E remains independent, and release validation stays green.
894/894 Vitest tests, 177/177 live compiled CLI E2E tests, and the complete release gate pass; exact four-metric baseline is documented without claiming 100 percent.
Portable four-metric coverage foundation completed with direct full release validation and read-only live evidence; pm linked-runner defect filed upstream as pm-cli#642.
